sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) boiling, or foaming (of waves), Hab 3:15 compare חָמַר No. 1.

(2) clay (so called from its being of a red kind, comp. the root No. 2)-(a) of the potter, Isa 45:9. (b) for sealing with, Job 38:14 cement, mortar, Gen 11:3 mire, Isa 10:6 Job 10:9 30:19 .

(3) a heap, a mound (see the root No. 3), Exo 8:10 hence a Homer, a measure of dry things containing ten Baths, Levit. 27:16 Num 11:32 Eze 45:11, 13 Eze 45:13, 14 Eze 45:14. By later writers the same measure is called כֹּר, which see.
